## Problem

What behavior or contract gap exists?

## Behavior

What must be true?

## Non-goals

What is out of scope?

## Required evidence

## Acceptance examples

Concrete examples. Prefer user-visible examples or fixture names.

## Test mapping

## Implementation mapping

Which crates, modules, commands, or workflows own this?

## CI proof

Which commands and CI lanes prove it?

## Metrics / promotion rule

What moves this from experimental to stabilizing or stable?

## Failure modes

What must not be allowed to silently pass?
